synopsis: ★ 全球票房1億3千萬臺幣 ★ 2021 澳洲導演協會獎最佳動畫導演提名 ★改編自童書作家潔恩萊昂斯作品 福來弟魯賓即將繼位成為狼人家族的領袖，他也相信自己有如父親福霸一般，會成為史上最威猛的狼人......然而，在福來弟14歲生日第一次變身時，他居然變成一隻名副其實的......貴賓犬？！在明天日出之前，他需要證明自己夠格當狼人，否則他就會因資格不符永遠遭到家族放逐。鼓起勇氣踏上探險之路的福來弟，在夜晚大城市的街道失去了方向，一隻流浪狗大姊大貝貝陰錯陽差幫助了他，卻同時被捕狗隊抓住，他必須在今晚克服超萌的外表，逃出捕狗隊的牢籠，還有人類瘋哥一直來攪局，讓他證明自己是100%狼人之路更顯困難重重。 https://reurl.cc/2ar7N9
synopsis_en:
★ Global Box Office: 130 Million TWD ★ 2021 Australian Directors' Guild Award Nominee for Best Direction in an Animation ★ Based on the book by children's author Jayne Lyons.

Freddy Lupin is set to succeed as the leader of his werewolf pack. He is confident that, just like his father Flasheart, he will become the most fearsome werewolf in history. However, during his first transformation on his 14th birthday, things go hilariously wrong when he turns into a literal... poodle?!

Freddy has until sunrise tomorrow to prove he has the heart of a wolf, or he faces permanent exile from the family. Summoning his courage, he embarks on an adventure but quickly loses his way in the dark city streets. He crosses paths with a streetwise stray named Batty, who helps him out, only for them both to be captured by dog catchers. Now, Freddy must overcome his adorable exterior, escape the pound, and deal with the meddling of a human named Foxwell Cripp. His journey to prove he is 100% Wolf has never been more challenging.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1962 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第三名） Top 10 Japanese Films (3rd Place), Kinema Junpo 1963 坎城影展 評審團 特別獎 1963 日本電影藍絲帶獎最佳男主角、劇本 Best Actor & Best Screenplay, Blue Ribbon Award 寬永七年（1630年），德川幕府第三代將軍家光的中央集權統治，削弱大名武家勢力，曾威武風光的武士淪為浪人。彼時，許多浪人至大名家以切腹要脅、敲詐錢財，令人不堪其擾，其中包括名門井伊家。某日，老浪人津雲半四郎登門借地切腹，家臣決定將計就計，讓他自行了斷。但隨著老浪人娓娓道出此行始末，他的本意也逐漸揭露。 繼《人間的條件》後，仲代達矢與小林正樹再次合作。以瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》為本，橋本忍執筆 編劇 ，用倒敘法鋪陳懸疑氛圍。由擅長大場面的宮島義勇再次掌鏡，刻畫悲憤而殘酷的復仇。在推崇武士道的國家與時代，本片卻反其道而行大膽批判，仲代達矢曾多次表示欣賞此精神，並將 本片 列為最愛之作。
tags: 坎城影展評審團特別獎
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
1962 Kinema Junpo Top 10 Japanese Films (3rd Place)
1963 Cannes Film Festival Special Jury Prize
1963 Blue Ribbon Awards for Best Actor & Best Screenplay

In 1630 (the seventh year of the Kanei era), the centralized rule of the third Tokugawa Shogun, Iemitsu, weakened the power of the daimyo houses, leaving once-proud samurai to wander as masterless ronin. During this time, many ronin began extorting money from daimyo estates by threatening to commit ritual suicide (seppuku) on their grounds—a nuisance that plagued many, including the prestigious Ii clan. One day, an elderly ronin named Tsugumo Hanshiro arrives at the Ii estate, requesting a place to commit seppuku. The clan's retainers decide to call his bluff, intending to force him to follow through with the act. However, as the old man slowly recounts the story of his journey, his true intentions are gradually revealed.

Following *The Human Condition*, Tatsuya Nakadai and Masaki Kobayashi collaborate once again. Based on Yasuhiko Takiguchi's novel *Ibun Ronin-ki* and written by legendary screenwriter Shinobu Hashimoto, the film employs a non-linear narrative to build a masterful atmosphere of suspense. Captured by cinematographer Yoshio Miyajima, known for his grand visual scale, the film depicts a tragic and brutal tale of revenge. In an era and nation that glorified the code of Bushido, this film offers a bold and scathing critique—a spirit that Tatsuya Nakadai has frequently praised, citing this as one of his favorite works.

synopsis: 改編自文學家駱以軍的作品《小兒子》，有糊里糊塗的爸爸 、嫻熟優雅的媽媽、害羞而正經的大兒子、機靈萬分卻常脫線演出的小兒子，以及陪伴這個家庭成長的小黃狗端端。他們的生活有時爆笑、有時溫馨、有時衝突，但總讓人會心一笑。 家庭不就是這樣？儘管有時跌跌撞撞，卻總盡力彼此療癒，共同成長。
synopsis_en: Adapted from the work *My Little Boys* by author Luo Yi-chun, the story features a muddle-headed father, an elegant and graceful mother, a shy and serious older son, and a clever yet quirky younger son, along with their loyal yellow dog, Duan Duan. Their lives are sometimes hilarious, sometimes heartwarming, and occasionally full of conflict, but they always bring a knowing smile to your face. Isn’t that exactly what family is? Despite the occasional stumbles, they always do their best to heal one another and grow together.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
synopsis: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴 兼 妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。 導演 稻 塚秀孝歷時一年多貼身跟拍，聚焦無名塾的訓練過程及劇場公演，穿插仲代和弟子的訪談，記錄他鮮為人知的一面。拍攝時，仲代已年屆80，仍毅然佇立於心愛的舞台，與日漸衰退的記性和體力抗衡。 他 始終懷抱身為無名小卒時的初心，貫徹此生志向──為演員而活，並將這份信念傳承給下個世代。
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
In 1975, Tatsuya Nakadai and his creative partner and wife, Kyoko Miyazaki, co-founded the acting school Mumeijuku. Nakadai personally oversees talent selection and intensive training, maintaining a rigorous schedule from 6 a.m. to 8 p.m. When performing, he suppresses his own presence, allowing only the character to collide with his scene partner. Mumeijuku does more than just train actors; it cultivates "human beings" capable of standing on their own in the world, producing a steady stream of talent for 50 years. Yet, beneath his roles as a teacher and a performer, Nakadai’s true self is that of a humble actor who hand-copies his lines with a calligraphy brush and pastes them on his bedroom walls for constant memorization. 

Director Hidetaka Inozuka spent over a year following Nakadai, capturing the training process at Mumeijuku and its theatrical performances. Interspersed with interviews with Nakadai and his disciples, the film documents a side of him rarely seen by the public. At the time of filming, Nakadai was in his 80s, yet he remained steadfast on his beloved stage, battling a fading memory and declining physical strength. He continues to embrace the "beginner’s mind" of his early days as a "nobody," fulfilling his life’s mission—to live for the craft of acting—and passing this conviction on to the next generation.

synopsis: 無名青年在傾頹的城市漫遊，在一場場與不同階級、身分的陌生男人的性愛中探索。盜用上個男人的隻言片語，重構自我印記。邂逅波斯詩人、擁抱泰國移民、親吻黑人演員，在一場場私密的事後對話中困惑、掙扎、重生。
synopsis_en: A nameless young man wanders through a decaying city, exploring himself through a series of sexual encounters with strangers of different classes and backgrounds. Appropriating fragments of speech from the men who came before, he reconstructs his own identity. He encounters a Persian poet, embraces a Thai immigrant, and kisses a Black actor; through these intimate post-coital conversations, he navigates confusion and struggle toward a sense of rebirth.

movie_title: 生命之詩：4K數位修復版－早安！周日經典電影院

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1981 日本藍絲帶獎最佳男主角、男配角 Best Actor & Supporting Actor, Blue Ribbon Awards 1981 電影旬報讀者票選獎 Readers' Choice Award, Kinema Junpo 1981 日本電影學院獎最佳男主角、攝影、燈光獲獎；最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、美術設計、配樂、音效提名 Winners of Best Supporting Actor, Cinematography 明治維新讓日本躋身一流強國，擴張野心劍指中國東北與朝鮮，因此 觸怒 歐洲傳統強權俄羅斯帝國，戰火一觸即發。為了掌握旅順港的控制權，俄軍在鄰近的「二百三高地」修築了號稱戰爭史上最堅固的要塞，準備給日軍迎頭痛擊；誓死效忠天皇的陸軍大將乃木希典，則率領裝備精良的第三軍團，不惜一切奪取戰略要地。 有別於同年的《影武者》，仲代達矢在本片 詮釋日俄戰爭名將 乃木希典，收放自如的情緒堆疊，令無數觀眾動容落淚。東映耗費鉅資打造華麗布景，延請以戰爭電影聞名的舛田利雄執導，殘酷慘烈的血戰場面對比極致純粹的武士道精神，上映前後皆引發激烈熱議，掀起戰爭大片風潮。1972年日中建交後，台灣禁止進口日片，本片於1980年第一屆「金馬獎國際觀摩影展」中首度放映，此後便無上映機會。 that same year, Nakadai Tatsuya portrays the "War God" Nogi with restrained, commanding authority. His nuanced performance captures the crushing emotional toll of duty, a legendary portrayal that moved audiences to tears.
tags: 日本藍絲帶獎最佳男主角
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
1981 Blue Ribbon Awards: Best Actor & Best Supporting Actor
1981 Kinema Junpo: Readers' Choice Award
1981 Japan Academy Film Prize: Winner of Best Actor, Cinematography, and Lighting; Nominated for Best Picture, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, Art Direction, Score, and Sound.

The Meiji Restoration propelled Japan into the ranks of the world's leading powers. Its expansionist ambitions toward Northeast China and Korea provoked the Russian Empire, a traditional European power, bringing the two nations to the brink of war. To secure control over Port Arthur, the Russian army constructed what was considered the most formidable fortress in military history on the nearby "203 Hill," prepared to deliver a crushing blow to the Japanese. General Maresuke Nogi, fiercely loyal to the Emperor, led the well-equipped Third Army, determined to seize this strategic stronghold at any cost.

In a departure from his role in *Kagemusha* released that same year, Tatsuya Nakadai portrays the "War God" Nogi with restrained, commanding authority. His nuanced performance captures the crushing emotional toll of duty, a legendary portrayal that moved audiences to tears. Toei spared no expense in creating magnificent sets, enlisting Toshio Masuda—renowned for his war epics—to direct. The film’s contrast between brutal, bloody combat and the pure essence of the Bushido spirit sparked intense debate and ignited a trend for large-scale war spectacles. Following the normalization of diplomatic relations between Japan and China in 1972, Japanese films were banned from import in Taiwan; this film was screened only once during the inaugural Golden Horse International Film Exhibition in 1980 and has not been released there since.

movie_title_en: Yiyi: A One and a Two
synopsis: 八歲的洋洋成長於台北的一個中產家庭，身為電腦公司總經理的父親面臨生意及婚姻的交叉口，母親敏敏面對一成不變、成日照顧家中病倒的母親的生活，決心尋求改變，就讀北一女的姊姊婷婷則是處於悸動的青春年華。洋洋喜歡拿著相機拍人的後腦勺，以他的視角來看大人們的世界，拍攝家人看不到的「背面」，城市中的人們看似接近，但都各自有著無可逃避、必須面對的苦惱，面對人生的提問，答案或許沒有這麼複雜，卻總是不完美。
synopsis_en: Eight-year-old Yang-Yang is growing up in a middle-class family in Taipei. His father, the general manager of a computer company, finds himself at a crossroads in both his business and his marriage. His mother, Min-Min, overwhelmed by the monotony of caring for her bedridden mother, decides to seek a change. Meanwhile, his older sister Ting-Ting, a student at Taipei First Girls' High School, is navigating the restless stirrings of youth. Yang-Yang enjoys taking photos of the backs of people's heads, observing the adult world through his own lens to capture the "hidden side" that his family cannot see. In the city, people appear close, yet each carries their own unavoidable struggles. When faced with life’s questions, the answers may not be complex, but they are never quite perfect.

movie_title: FINALFANTASYXIV 光之老爸 劇場版
movie_title_en: Brave Father Online: Our Story of Final Fantasy XIV
synopsis: ★改編自日本部落客Maidy真實故事 ★《最終幻想》遊戲系列首度進軍真人電影 退休的工作狂老爸，開始在線上遊戲組隊打怪，卻不知道神隊友竟然就是...... 即將升遷的工作狂老爸（吉田鋼太郎飾），某天卻突然辭職。家人大感傻眼之餘，也只能看著老爸終日對著電視機發呆的背影。光生（坂口健太郎飾）真的很想知道老爸在想什麼，他想起小時候曾經和老爸一起打電動的那個晚上，那是唯一一次父子之間真心的交流，於是他決定啟動「光之老爸」計畫。他送給老爸最新一代的《最終幻想》遊戲，作為退休禮物，邀請老爸進入充滿回憶的線上世界。光生隱藏自己的真實身分，以神秘女玩家Maidy為名，組隊帶著菜鳥老爸一起過關斬將，在這之中，光生在得到許多不知長相、不知姓名的夥伴相助，而迷上線上遊戲的老爸也逐漸開始向隊友卸下心房，原來，老爸心中有個從未對任何人說出口的秘密...... https://reurl.cc/K2ANxR
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of Japanese blogger Maidy
★ The first live-action film adaptation from the "Final Fantasy" game series

A retired workaholic father starts teaming up to slay monsters in an online game, never suspecting that his legendary teammate is actually...

One day, a workaholic father (played by Kotaro Yoshida) on the verge of a major promotion suddenly resigns. His family is left bewildered, able only to watch his back as he spends his days staring blankly at the television. Akio (played by Kentaro Sakaguchi) desperately wants to know what his father is thinking. Recalling a single night in his childhood when they played a video game together—the only time they ever truly connected—he decides to initiate "Project Hikari" (The Father of Light).

He gifts his father the latest "Final Fantasy" game as a retirement present, inviting him into an online world full of memories. Hiding his true identity, Akio adopts the persona of a mysterious female player named Maidy, teaming up to guide his rookie father through the game's many challenges. Supported by a group of anonymous online comrades, Akio watches as his father becomes hooked on the game and slowly begins to open up to his teammates. As it turns out, his father is harboring a secret he has never shared with anyone...

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】小超人大老虎

synopsis: ★1991 奧斯卡最佳原創配樂、最佳原創歌曲提名 ★1991 金球獎音樂喜劇類最佳影片、音樂喜劇類最佳男主角提名 ★屹立三十年喜劇經典，全球票房4.7億美元創下真人喜劇片新紀錄 凱文是一個大家庭中最年幼的成員，本來舉家飛往巴黎歡度聖誕節時，他卻意外地被遺留在家中，而更不幸的是，凱文的家成為了一對賊匪(史登和派西)的目標，小鬼凱文努力抵檔這兩個匪徒，不惜翻天覆地，引發連場刺激惹笑的場面。 https://reurl.cc/npoeD1
tags: 影人專題：克里斯哥倫布
synopsis_en:
★ 1991 Academy Award nominations for Best Original Score and Best Original Song
★ 1991 Golden Globe nominations for Best Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy and Best Actor – Musical or Comedy
★ A comedy classic for over thirty years, it set a new record for live-action comedies with a global box office of $470 million.

Kevin is the youngest member of a large family. When the entire family flies to Paris to celebrate Christmas, he is accidentally left behind at home. To make matters worse, Kevin's house becomes the target of a pair of burglars (Stern and Pesci). Young Kevin must do everything he can to fend off the intruders, turning the house upside down in a series of thrilling and hilarious confrontations.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1959 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第九名） Top 10 Japanese Films (9th Place), Kinema Junpo 1960 金球獎最佳外語片 Best Foreign Language Film, Golden Globe Awards 1960 坎城影展評審團獎 Jury Prize, Cannes FF 古董鑑定師劍持為對抗衰老，異想天開地設計一場危險佈局：引導女兒的醫師未婚夫木村介入自己與妻子郁子之間，企圖利用「嫉妒」來重振自身雄風。隨著窺伺視角頻頻切換，端莊妻子的慾望覺醒、準女婿的躁動野心與女兒的冷眼旁觀逐一浮現——為了慾望機關算盡，幾人最終將迎來如何的結局？ 仲代達矢連續兩年和導演市川崑合作了兩部作品，《鍵》是第二部，他為木村設定知性而隱含邪惡氣息的冷調表演，與同時期《人間的條件》中的道德形象形成鮮明對比，也確立了仲代 游刃於正反角色之間 的演技。改編自谷崎潤一郎同名小說，市川崑與編劇和田夏十及長谷部慶次，將原著陰翳耽美的官能書寫，重構為一齣黑色諷刺喜劇。由宮川一夫掌鏡，搭配高度風格化的光影調度，冷靜地貼近角色慾望。 Antique appraiser Kenmochi, desperate to defy aging, draws his daughter's physician fiancé Kimura into a dangerous scheme to revive his waning virility through jealousy. Adapted from Tanizaki Junichiro's novel, Ichikawa Kon reshapes its shadowed eroticism into a dark satirical comedy, with Miyagawa Kazuo's stylized lighting coolly charting desire and Nakadai delivering a chilling performance in stark contrast to his moral role in
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
1959 Kinema Junpo Top 10 Japanese Films (9th Place)
1960 Golden Globe Award for Best Foreign Language Film
1960 Cannes Film Festival Jury Prize

Antique appraiser Kenmochi, in a desperate bid to defy aging, devises a dangerous scheme: he maneuvers Kimura, his daughter’s physician fiancé, into an affair with his wife, Ikuko, hoping that jealousy will reignite his waning virility. As the voyeuristic perspectives shift, the prim wife’s awakening desires, the future son-in-law’s restless ambition, and the daughter’s cold detachment all come to light. In this web of calculated lust, what fate awaits them?

Marking his second consecutive collaboration with director Kon Ichikawa, Tatsuya Nakadai delivers a chillingly intellectual performance as Kimura. This sinister turn stands in stark contrast to his moralistic role in *The Human Condition*, cementing his reputation for versatility between hero and villain. Adapted from Jun'ichiro Tanizaki’s novel, Ichikawa and screenwriters Natto Wada and Keiji Hasebe transform the original’s dark, aesthetic eroticism into a biting black comedy. Captured through Kazuo Miyagawa’s highly stylized cinematography, the film uses light and shadow to maintain a clinical, detached gaze on the characters' spiraling desires.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
The swordsman Jin Shange originally intended to serve his country by joining the ranks of Marshal Zhang Zhe. However, he was framed for the murder of the Prime Minister's son and sentenced to exile at the frontier. During his transport, the escort was ambushed by Jin soldiers; in the chaos, Jin Shange broke free from his shackles, defeated the enemy, and escaped.

Meanwhile, Marshal Zhang Zhe was killed by the Jin commander, Wanyan. The Marshal's daughter, Enzhu, managed to flee to Lu Village with the help of Wang Feng. Seeking vengeance, they began recruiting heroes to their cause. Jin Shange happened to pass by their martial arts tournament, where his peerless skills impressed Wang Feng, who invited him to join the resistance against the Jin invaders. Jin Shange readily agreed, but on one condition: he must marry Enzhu. To avenge her father, Enzhu consented, provided that Jin Shange first return with Wanyan’s head.

Jin Shange initially presents himself as a decadent, roguish, and even lecherous figure, subverting the traditional "chivalrous hero" archetype of wuxia cinema. As the group unites to fight the Jin, this unconventional warrior gradually redeems his image, ultimately making a stylish, solitary exit reminiscent of a classic Western hero.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2025 慕尼黑電影節 剛出獄的湯姆繼承了一棟價值不菲的房產，正當他計畫賣掉房子、遠赴西班牙展開新生活時，卻發現最大的阻礙竟是患有唐氏症的同父異母弟弟羅蘭，由於羅蘭擁有法律保障的終身居住權，讓湯姆的如意算盤徹底落空，為了將這塊絆腳石逐出家門，湯姆使出渾身解數，這對性格南轅北轍的兄弟就此展開一段雞飛狗跳、衝突不斷的同居生活。 https://reurl.cc/qpgaeq
synopsis_en:
(Note: Rated PG-12) ★ 2025 Munich Film Festival

Fresh out of prison, Tom inherits a valuable estate. Just as he plans to sell the property and move to Spain to start a new life, he discovers his biggest obstacle: his half-brother Roland, who has Down syndrome. Because Roland holds a legally protected lifelong right of residence, Tom’s grand scheme is completely derailed. Determined to remove this "stumbling block," Tom pulls out all the stops to drive him out, sparking a chaotic and conflict-ridden cohabitation between two brothers who couldn't be more different.

synopsis: ★《極度不妥！》牧島輝、《陸王》和田正人主演 猫塚的貓咪走失了，他到寵物偵探事務所請求協助，猿渡調查後發現牠在某對夫婦家幸福地生活，猫塚無力支付調查費，只好在事務所打工償還，有一天，裕太因貓咪不見而到事務所求助，他的父母正在調停離婚，同樣父母離異的猫塚能體會男孩感受，於是猫塚和裕太一起去找他的貓咪權太，找到權太時，裕太家出現了奇蹟…... https://reurl.cc/K2Aq6R
synopsis_en:
Starring Hikaru Makishima (*Extremely Inappropriate!*) and Masato Wada (*Rikuoh*). 

When Nekozuka’s cat goes missing, he seeks help from a pet detective agency. After an investigation, the detective, Sawatari, discovers that the cat is now living happily with a married couple. Unable to afford the investigation fee, Nekozuka has no choice but to work at the agency to pay off his debt. One day, a young boy named Yuta comes to the agency for help because his cat is missing. Yuta’s parents are currently undergoing divorce mediation; having grown up with divorced parents himself, Nekozuka deeply empathizes with the boy’s feelings. Nekozuka and Yuta set out together to find his cat, Gonta, and when they finally do, a miracle occurs at Yuta’s home...

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Toronto IFF 2025
IDFA 2025
Golden Horse Awards: Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing

Veteran editor Mary Stephen possesses a distinctly East Asian face yet bears a Western surname: Stephen. Delving into her family’s little-known history through her father’s journals, she discovers that both her parents lived under assumed names with pasts where truth and fiction blur. Her father appears to be a descendant of Australian Aboriginal fishermen, while her mother—a woman who once harbored literary dreams—seems to have had a subtle connection to a romance in China involving a member of Virginia Woolf’s family.

In her quest to uncover the origins of the "Stephen" name, she sifts through home movies and old photographs, reconstructing a private family history that feels truer than reality itself amidst an era of colonial expansion and upheaval. Navigating a maze of multiple narratives, she interrogates her own identity, exploring how individuals can find flight once more through the fog of diaspora by rewriting their own history. Together, she pieces together a profound cinematic portrait of life spanning borders and a century of global change.

synopsis: 9年後，他們於巴黎再次重逢。 Jesse將那晚在維也納的邂逅，寫成了暢銷小說，這天，他來到巴黎的新書發表會。Celine看到這個消息，來到了現場。 而大概90分鐘後，Jesse即將啟程返回美國。 各自展開新生活的他們喝了杯咖啡，走在浪漫的巴黎城市小徑裡，乘著船在塞納河畔的夕陽下。從帶有一點自尊的防衛式聊天，到重新卸下心防.....
synopsis_en: Nine years later, they reunite in Paris. Jesse has turned their brief encounter in Vienna into a bestselling novel, and today he is in the city for a book signing. Having seen the news, Celine arrives at the event. With only about 90 minutes before Jesse must depart for the United States, the two—who have since built separate lives—share a coffee and wander through the romantic backstreets of Paris, eventually boarding a boat on the Seine as the sun begins to set. Their conversation shifts from guarded, prideful exchanges to slowly letting their defenses down once again...

synopsis: 鄉下女孩Holly憧憬著紐約的美好，就像她熱切凝望櫥窗中的第凡內珠寶，可望而不可及，只能過著自欺欺人的生活。 放棄寫作的Paul，接受了貴婦的包養，忍氣吞聲的活著。 他們像是屋簷下躲雨的兩隻倉皇野貓。 能夠給予溫暖的，只有彼此......
synopsis_en: Holly, a small-town girl, yearns for the glamour of New York. Much like the Tiffany jewels she gazes at through the display window, her dreams remain tantalizingly out of reach, forcing her to live a life of self-deception. Paul, a writer who has abandoned his craft, lives as a kept man for a wealthy socialite, enduring a life of quiet resignation. They are like two stray cats huddling under the eaves to escape the rain, finding that the only warmth they can truly give is to one another.

cinema_name: 臺灣當代文化實驗場 C-LAB
synopsis: 自2020年起，C-LAB 未來視覺實驗室持續推動實驗展演計畫「FUTURE VISION LAB」，並以數位實驗建築為起點，打造穹形場域（DOME），持續探索科技媒體的視覺極限，過去六年已進行超過兩百件作品展演。2023年，在文化部支持下完成軟硬體升級，打造直徑15公尺、全臺唯一的巨型移動式戶外沉浸體驗空間 「C-LAB穹頂劇場」 。沉浸影像投影系統總運算可達 8K × 8K 超高解析度，並克服球形曲面投影在校正、融接、對位、播放控制與影像前製等多重技術挑戰。場域採雙層結構設計，搭配客製透聲投影膜片與25.4聲道環繞聲場環境，打造高規格沉浸式體驗。未來視覺實驗室持續優化穹形場域之創作環境，並向國際標準接軌，展現臺灣在科技藝術領域的創作能量。 「FUTURE VISION LAB 2026」將於 2026年4月18日至6月7日，連續8個週末登場，匯集來自臺灣、法國、西班牙、匈牙利、奧地利、韓國、日本、美國與加拿大等各地精彩作品，共呈現19件作品、16檔節目。透過展覽、播映與現場 Live 演出等多元形式，在跨國創作的交會之中，邀請觀眾走入C-LAB穹頂劇場，沉浸於多元文化交織的感官體驗。 ｜ 入場方式 ☄ 節目索票資訊請鎖定「C-LAB 未來視覺實驗室」 臉書 或「臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB」 ACCUPASS 。 ☄ 詳細節目資訊請至「FUTURE VISION LAB 2026」官網查詢： https://fvl.clab.org.tw/festival/2026 【播映及現場演出】 ⭓ 每場次皆需事先索票，一人一票憑票入場。 ⭓ 每場播映/現場演出於開演前10分鐘開放入場，並不開放遲到觀眾入場。 ⭓ 4/7(二)起，每週一將開放〔隔週末展映場次〕索票，請密切追蹤把握。 【售票節目】 售票節目共2檔 ① 5/13(三) 19:30｜《未來視覺派對#3》 ② 5/30(六) 19:00｜姚瑞中 X 郭一 X Meuko! Meuko《虛迷山》派對場 ⭓ 一人一票憑票入場。 ⭓ 開演前10分鐘開放入場，並不開放遲到觀眾入場。 ⭓ 4/10(五) 中午12:00早鳥8折啟售；4/20(一) 中午12:00 正式啟售。 【展覽】 ① 5/21-24｜魏廷宇《誤差追獵》 ⭓ 每12分鐘為一梯次，每梯次開放30人進場體驗。 ⭓ 進場方式採現場排隊依序入場，直到該梯次人數額滿為止。 ⭓ 若想要再次體驗作品，需於前一梯次結束後先離場並重新排隊依序等候入場。 ⭓ 開放入場時若排隊人員不在現場即視同放棄，需重新排隊依序等候入場。 ② 5/28-31｜姚瑞中 X 郭一 X Meuko! Meuko《虛迷山》 ⭓ 採現場排隊依序入場，場內人數額滿為止。 ⭓ 場內人數上限為100人，若額滿請等候場內觀眾離場後，依現場人數管制進場。 ⭓ 開放入場時若排隊人員不在現場即視同放棄，需重新排隊依序等候入場。 ｜ 注意事項 ⭓ 演出內容有部分包含強烈閃光，敬請斟酌入場。 ⭓ 因活動場地為鏡面地板，建議請穿著「褲裝」進場觀賞。 ⭓ 因場內空間有限，禁止鋪設野餐墊、椅子；若有其他需求，請洽詢現場工作人員協助。 ⭓ 播映過程可拍照、即時動態拍攝，但禁止使用閃光燈。 ⭓ 主辦單位保有調整與變更活動之權利。 ｜展演播映場次表 ｜節目列表 ◉ 【開場影像】：浮點設計｜《萬象之初》 ◉ 桑德琳．德米耶、拉爾夫．基爾赫茲《循鹿》 ◉ AINO X Yunyoung JANG《深層根木》 ◉ 凱蒂．卡托納《藏識》 ◉ Kohui《眾聲場：環形運動》 ◉ MONOCOLOR《意識之維》 ◉ 魏廷宇 《誤差追獵》 ◉ 姚瑞中 X 郭一 X Meuko! Meuko!《虛迷山》 ◉ 移動故事屋 《池塘國選舉》 ◉ 初未來 X 超維度 X 江戶未來世 X Kivi X 賴皮 X 林強 《新摩登時代》 ◉ PHOSPHEN 《時空》 *本片含親密關係與性別認同內容，建議觀眾自行斟酌。 ◉ 吳秉聖 X 劉承杰 《時間層理》 ◉ 短篇集錦－ barbe_generative_diary 《描繪寂靜》 ◉ 短篇集錦－李根耀《街道之書：同淋一場雨》 ◉ 短篇集錦－兪志美《非體 1》 *本作品包含部分裸露、女性胸部的特寫畫面，以及嘔吐的描寫。建議觀眾自行斟酌。 ◉ 短篇集錦－謝鎮璘《光所到之處》 ◉ 琳恩．湯琳森《山之夜曲》 ◉ 《未來視覺派對 #3》 ◉ 《沉浸式影音工作坊－校際成果呈現》國立臺北藝術大學新媒體藝術系 ✕ 國立清華大學藝術學院學士班 / 科藝所 ✕ 臺北科技大學互動系 FUTURE VISION LAB 2026 計畫主持人｜蔡奇宏 節目統籌｜廖苑喻、陳湘綺 技術統籌｜蔡奇宏 技術執行｜劉嘉昀、黃文雍、楊泓軒 前期建築概念設計｜陽明交通大學建築研究所 JHStudio 建築協力｜achy_made 聲場設計｜C-LAB 臺灣聲響實驗室 音響系統統籌｜黑米創意工作室 主視覺設計暨開場影像｜浮點設計 網站設計｜林瀚寬 靜態攝影｜林軒朗、ANPIS FOTO 王世邦 動態攝影｜散步映畫有限公司 前導影片剪輯｜浮石影像工作室 參與藝術家｜ 江戶未來世、初未來、吳秉聖、李根耀、拉爾夫．基爾赫茲、林強、姚瑞中、兪志美、浮點設計、桑德琳．德米耶、郭一、移動故事屋、凱蒂．卡托納、超維度、琳恩．湯琳森、劉承杰、劉東昱、賴皮、蔡奇宏、謝鎮璘、魏廷宇、AINO X Yunyoung JANG, barbe_generative_diary, Kohui, Kivi, MONOCOLOR, Meuko! Meuko!, PHOSPHEN 主辦單位｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB 補助單位｜文化部 執行單位｜C-LAB 未來視覺實驗室 合作單位｜臺北藝術大學新媒體藝術系、國立清華大學藝術學院、臺北科技大學互動設計系
synopsis_en:
Since 2020, the C-LAB Future Vision Lab has spearheaded the experimental exhibition project "FUTURE VISION LAB." Beginning with digital experimental architecture, the lab created the "DOME" to continuously explore the visual limits of technological media, showcasing over 200 works over the past six years. In 2023, with the support of the Ministry of Culture, the lab completed hardware and software upgrades to create the "C-LAB Dome"—Taiwan's only giant mobile outdoor immersive space with a 15-meter diameter. The immersive projection system achieves an ultra-high resolution of 8K × 8K, overcoming complex technical challenges such as calibration, stitching, alignment, playback control, and pre-production for spherical surfaces. The venue features a double-layer structure equipped with custom acoustically transparent projection membranes and a 25.4-channel surround sound environment, delivering a high-specification immersive experience. Future Vision Lab continues to optimize the creative environment of the dome to align with international standards, showcasing Taiwan’s creative energy in the field of tech-art.

"FUTURE VISION LAB 2026" will take place over eight consecutive weekends from April 18 to June 7, 2026. It brings together exceptional works from Taiwan, France, Spain, Hungary, Austria, South Korea, Japan, the USA, and Canada, featuring a total of 19 works across 16 programs. Through a diverse range of formats including exhibitions, screenings, and live performances, the festival invites audiences into the C-LAB Dome to immerse themselves in a sensory experience woven from cross-national creative intersections and diverse cultures.

｜ **Admission Information** ｜
☄ For ticketing information, please follow the "C-LAB Future Vision Lab" Facebook page or "Taiwan Contemporary Culture Lab (C-LAB)" on ACCUPASS.
☄ For detailed program information, please visit the official "FUTURE VISION LAB 2026" website: https://fvl.clab.org.tw/festival/2026

**【Screenings & Live Performances】**
⭓ All sessions require advance ticketing; one ticket per person for entry.
⭓ Entry opens 10 minutes before each screening/performance. Latecomers will not be admitted.
⭓ Starting April 7 (Tue), tickets for the following weekend's sessions will open every Monday. Please follow updates closely.

**【Ticketed Programs】**
There are two ticketed programs:
① May 13 (Wed) 19:30 | *Future Vision Party #3*
② May 30 (Sat) 19:00 | Yao Jui-chung X Kuo I X Meuko! Meuko! *Xumi Mountain* (Party Version)
⭓ One ticket

movie_title: 菲利斯之永夜島歷險記
movie_title_en: Felix and the Treasure of Morgaa
synopsis: ★2022 魁北克電影節最佳非魁北克電影、最佳首部長片提名 12歲的菲利斯相信兩年前在海上失蹤的父親仍然活著，於是他決定出發尋找父親的下落。陪他一起出海的夥伴有退休的漁夫老湯姆、愛偷東西的獨腳鸚鵡阿嘎，以及生性像狗的貓咪來福。他們一路漂流到永夜島，那裡有一座地下城，住著一個秘密社群，由狂妄自大的莫嘉所統治，那裏擁有令人難以置信的寶藏。 https://reurl.cc/ppgoxl
synopsis_en: Nominated for Best Non-Quebec Film and Best First Feature Film at the 2022 Quebec Film Festival. Twelve-year-old Felix is convinced that his father, who disappeared at sea two years ago, is still alive. Determined to find him, Felix sets out on a quest accompanied by Old Tom, a retired fisherman; Squawk, a thieving one-legged parrot; and Rover, a cat who acts just like a dog. Their journey leads them to the Island of Eternal Night, home to an underground city and a secret society ruled by the megalomaniacal Morgaä, where incredible treasures are hidden.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: ｜ 很久很久以前，在充滿飛龍和魔法的世界裡，有一位長髮公主蕾蘋絲，她有著最長、最美麗的秀髮。女巫葛朵將蕾蘋絲藏在禁忌森林深處的高塔裡，由巨龍休果負責看守，四周更用一道魔法高牆包圍。一天到晚，蕾蘋絲被葛朵的僕人使喚著；而她最喜歡的畫畫，只能 趁四下無人時 偷偷進行。陰錯陽差之下，蕾蘋絲無意間找到一個古老的地道，冒著被葛朵發現的危險，她獨自前往外面的世界。 改編自格林童話《長髮公主》，動畫讓飛龍、女巫、高塔栩栩如生，且為故事注入意想不到的魔法。芭比飾演的蕾蘋絲擁有一支魔法畫筆，畫出的任何東西都會成真。創意和魔法便成為她的武器，讓芭比勇敢突破詛咒。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en: Long, long ago, in a world filled with dragons and magic, there lived a princess named Rapunzel, who had the longest and most beautiful hair in the land. The witch Gothel kept Rapunzel hidden in a high tower deep within the Forbidden Forest, guarded by a dragon named Hugo and surrounded by an enchanted wall. Day and night, Rapunzel was at the beck and call of Gothel’s servants; her favorite passion, painting, could only be done in secret when no one was watching. By a twist of fate, Rapunzel accidentally discovers an ancient tunnel and, risking Gothel’s wrath, ventures out into the world alone. Adapted from the Brothers Grimm fairy tale "Rapunzel," this animation brings dragons, witches, and towers to life while infusing the story with unexpected magic. Rapunzel, portrayed by Barbie, possesses a magic paintbrush that makes anything she paints come true. With creativity and magic as her weapons, Barbie bravely breaks free from the curse.

synopsis: 在留尼旺的一個社區裡，宰牲節快要到了，小朋友卻因為家裡的傳統被同學嘲笑成「動物殺手」。當一隻山羊真的被送來時，他決定想辦法保護牠—可是，鄰居正偷偷盯著看。這是一個關於勇氣、選擇和友誼的動人故事。
synopsis_en: In a neighborhood on Réunion Island, as Eid al-Adha approaches, a young boy is taunted by his classmates as an "animal killer" because of his family's traditions. When a goat is delivered to his home, he decides to do whatever it takes to protect it—but the neighbors are watching closely. This is a moving story about courage, choice, and friendship.

synopsis: 一隻黑色小鳥和一隻白色小鳥住在一棵大樹上，過著平和快樂的生活。然而每當有新鮮事發生，他們便吵吵鬧鬧想爭個高下。透過簡單的兩隻小鳥主人翁的日常生活，用生動有趣的方式和孩子談論關於包容，妒忌和友情⋯⋯
synopsis_en: A little black bird and a little white bird live together in a big tree, leading a peaceful and happy life. However, whenever something new happens, they start bickering, each trying to outdo the other. Through the simple daily lives of these two feathered protagonists, this story uses a lively and engaging way to talk to children about tolerance, jealousy, and friendship...

synopsis: 德國動畫導演朱莉婭．奧克作品，畫風色彩簡約、故事節奏明快，別具風格、趣味橫生，是輕鬆愉快的喜劇小動畫。
synopsis_en: A work by German animation director Julia Ocker, this short animated comedy features a minimalist visual style and brisk pacing. Unique and full of humor, it is a lighthearted and delightful experience.

synopsis: 一大早的兔子班一陣騷動，因為班上來了個轉學生，而且竟然是隻青蛙！身為班上最特別的存在，蛙蛙不管做什麼都引人注目，然而和同學們語言不通，吃飯習慣也大不相同，蛙蛙覺得孤單又寂寞，有人會伸出援手，和他做朋友嗎？
synopsis_en: The Rabbit Class is in a stir this morning because a new transfer student has arrived—and he’s a frog! As the most unique member of the class, Froggy draws attention no matter what he does. However, between the language barrier and his very different eating habits, Froggy feels lonely and isolated. Will anyone reach out a helping hand and become his friend?

synopsis: 因為戰爭，阿弗雷不得不帶著家當遠離家鄉。他挨家挨戶請求幫助，卻一次一次被拒於門外。直到他遇到了願意釋出善意，遞出熱咖啡來溫暖他的夥伴。
synopsis_en: Displaced by war, Alfred is forced to flee his home with all his belongings. He goes from door to door seeking help, only to be rejected time and time again. That is, until he meets a kind soul who offers him a warm cup of coffee and the comfort of companionship.

synopsis: 卡皮巴拉一家逃進雞舍避難，可是雞群覺得牠們「好奇怪！」沒想到，一隻小雞先伸出翅膀說：「嗨，我想跟你們當朋友！」從那天起，農場裡有了不一樣的笑聲。因為當我們學會打開心門，世界也會變得更大一點。
synopsis_en: A family of capybaras flees to a chicken coop for shelter, but the chickens find them "so strange!" Unexpectedly, a little chick reaches out a wing and says, "Hi! I want to be your friend." From that day on, a new kind of laughter filled the farm. For when we learn to open our hearts, the world becomes a little bit wider.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 、 Color｜101min 2012 鹿特丹影展 IFF 2012 釜山影展 2013 大阪亞洲影展特別提及 Special Mention, Osaka Asian 摯愛髮妻意外猝逝，頹唐獨子中年失業，重病纏身的老木匠自知時日無多，決定將房門釘死，斷絕飲食，並囑咐兒子在找到工作前不要破門，以便續領年金維持生計。曾經三代同堂、幸福美滿，如今天人永別、僅餘苦難，人生一夜失色。一門之隔的父子二人，能否尋回彼此的羈絆，重拾生之慾，走完生之路？ 當年80歲的仲代達矢仍活躍於銀幕及舞台，戲中的他洗盡鉛華，詮釋生無可戀的憂傷老父，在大量特寫鏡頭下，將角色的陰暗絕望演繹得淋漓盡致，對戲的實力派演員北村一輝與柏林影后寺島忍亦有亮眼表現。繼同樣描繪「衰老與死亡」的《跟著春天去旅行》，仲代與小林政廣再續前緣，改編知名奇案，聚焦日本高齡社會寫實議題。小林特地為仲代量身打造角色，以寫遺書的心情拍出沉重卻真實的生死命題，直面311災後創傷心理圖景。
tags: 大阪亞洲影展特別提及
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Color | 101 min | 2012
IFF Rotterdam 2012, Busan IFF 2012
Special Mention, 2013 Osaka Asian Film Festival

After the sudden passing of his beloved wife and with his dejected only son facing middle-aged unemployment, an ailing old carpenter realizes his days are numbered. He decides to nail his bedroom door shut and starve himself, instructing his son not to break in until he finds a job so they can continue collecting pension payments to survive. What was once a blissful three-generation household is now fractured by death and mired in suffering; their lives have lost all color overnight. Separated by a single door, can the father and son rediscover their bond, regain the will to live, and see their journey through to the end?

At 80 years old, Tatsuya Nakadai remained a formidable force on screen and stage. Here, he delivers a raw, unadorned performance as a grieving father who has lost the will to live. Through a series of intense close-ups, he masterfully captures the character’s profound despair. He is joined by the talented Kazuki Kitamura and Berlin Silver Bear winner Shinobu Terajima, who both deliver standout performances. Following *Haru’s Journey*, which similarly explored themes of aging and mortality, Nakadai and director Masahiro Kobayashi reunite for this adaptation of a notorious true case, casting a spotlight on the harsh realities of Japan’s aging society. Kobayashi tailored the role specifically for Nakadai, approaching the film with the gravity of writing a final testament. The result is a heavy yet authentic exploration of life and death that confronts the psychological trauma of the post-311 era.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1980 坎城影展金棕櫚獎 Palme d'Or, Cannes FF 1981 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男演員、美術指導、音樂 Best Film, Director, Actor, Art direction & Music awards, Mainichi Film Awards 1981 奧斯卡金像獎最佳外語片、最佳美術指導提名 Nominated for Best Foreign Language Film & Art Direction, Academy Awards 日本戰國烽火正熾，武田信玄憑卓越統御能力雄霸一方，卻在戰場上意外中鎗。垂危之際，他囑咐親信隱瞞死訊，以維持士氣並牽制宿敵。接掌大局的家臣迫不得已，只能勸服一名外貌極似信玄的市井罪犯出任「影武者」。面對時勢變化如風，強敵環伺如林，戰況延燒如火，影武者能否搬演信玄虎威，運籌帷幄不動如山？ 本片開拍初期，黑澤明與原定主演發生衝突，仲代達矢臨危受命接演武田信玄及影武者，成功地在名將風範與匹夫鄙氣間切換自如，層次繁複的深刻演技助黑澤明拿下坎城金棕櫚，也讓兩位巨匠為《亂》的合作充分暖身。然而，此一時代鉅作 製作資金 一度幾近斷炊，端賴名導喬治盧卡斯與法蘭西斯柯波拉跨海協力籌資才得以完成，蔚為影壇佳話。

screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
1980 Cannes Film Festival – Palme d'Or
1981 Mainichi Film Awards – Best Film, Director, Actor, Art Direction, and Music
1981 Academy Awards – Nominated for Best Foreign Language Film and Best Art Direction

During the height of Japan’s Sengoku period, the formidable warlord Takeda Shingen dominates the land with his brilliant leadership, only to be unexpectedly shot on the battlefield. On his deathbed, he orders his inner circle to keep his passing a secret to maintain morale and deter his rivals. Desperate to maintain order, his retainers recruit a common criminal who bears a striking resemblance to Shingen to serve as his "Kagemusha" (Shadow Warrior). As the political landscape shifts like the wind, enemies surround them like a forest, and war rages like fire, can this double embody Shingen’s tiger-like majesty and remain as immovable as a mountain while commanding the clan?

Early in production, Akira Kurosawa clashed with the original lead actor, leading Tatsuya Nakadai to step in at the last minute to play both Takeda Shingen and the Shadow Warrior. His nuanced performance, seamlessly shifting between the aura of a legendary general and the coarseness of a commoner, helped Kurosawa secure the Palme d'Or and served as a precursor to their collaboration on *Ran*. This epic production nearly collapsed due to a lack of funding, but was saved when renowned directors George Lucas and Francis Ford Coppola stepped in to help secure international financing—a story that has since become legendary in the film world.

synopsis: 如果你能打開一扇門，走進去重溫人生中的關鍵時刻，會發生什麼事？莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
synopsis_en: What if you could open a door and step back into the pivotal moments of your life? Sarah and David are two strangers who meet at a mutual friend's wedding. Through a series of unexpected twists of fate, they embark on a bold, fantastical, and beautiful journey. In this whimsical adventure, they revisit key moments from their pasts, gaining a new understanding of how they arrived at the present—and perhaps even finding a chance to rewrite their future.

synopsis: 剛經歷失婚打擊的作家Frances，在好友的鼓勵下前往義大利托斯卡尼旅遊。原本只是想散散心，卻在陰錯陽差之下，衝動買下了一棟名為「Bramasole」的老舊別墅。這棟房子破舊不堪、雜草叢生，就像她當時支離破碎的生活。 Frances決定留下來，親手修復這棟老屋。在整修的過程中，她遇見了古怪卻溫暖的鄰居、一群熱情的工人，以及無數個意想不到的驚喜。
synopsis_en: Frances, a writer reeling from a recent divorce, travels to Tuscany, Italy, at the encouragement of her best friend. What was meant to be a simple getaway takes an unexpected turn when, through a twist of fate, she impulsively buys a crumbling villa named "Bramasole." Dilapidated and overgrown, the house is a reflection of her own fractured life. Frances decides to stay and restore the villa herself. Throughout the renovation, she encounters eccentric yet warm-hearted neighbors, a group of spirited workers, and countless unexpected surprises.

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Toronto IFF 2025
IDFA 2025
Golden Horse Awards: Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing

Veteran editor Mary Stephen possesses a distinctly East Asian face yet bears a Western surname: Stephen. Delving into her family’s little-known history through her father’s journals, she discovers that both her parents lived under assumed names with pasts where truth and fiction blur. Her father appears to be a descendant of Australian Aboriginal fishermen, while her mother—a woman who once harbored literary dreams—seems to have had a subtle connection to a romance in China involving a member of Virginia Woolf’s family.

In her quest to uncover the origins of the "Stephen" name, she sifts through home movies and old photographs, reconstructing a private family history that feels truer than reality itself amidst an era of colonial expansion and upheaval. Navigating a maze of multiple narratives, she interrogates her own identity, exploring how individuals can find flight once more through the fog of diaspora by rewriting their own history. Together, she pieces together a profound cinematic portrait of life spanning borders and a century of global change.

synopsis: ★ 第46屆金穗影展觀摩影片 那年夏天，媽媽又住進醫院。沂凌因身世問題再加上遭受姊姊思晴突如其來的妒忌，而感到無所適從。在日復一日的生活中，她們練習用力呼吸，也練習迎接死亡到來的那一天。 https://reurl.cc/V2EmY5
synopsis_en:
★ Official Selection, 46th Golden Harvest Awards

That summer, Mother was hospitalized once again. Yi-ling felt adrift, burdened by the secrets of her birth and the sudden, inexplicable jealousy of her older sister, Si-qing. Through the repetition of daily life, they practice breathing with all their might, while learning to face the day that death inevitably arrives.

synopsis: ★2021 金馬影展 自閉症者天生不懂得，也學不會一般人表達感情的方式，難以應付主流社會複雜的人際互動，但他們往往固?於特定愛好，進而在特定範疇如繪畫、音樂、寫作上，展現特有的天分。韓淑華老師十多年來教導自閉症者繪畫，白天的星星對他們獨特的美學風格屢感驚艷，2003年她成立多寶藝術學堂，為成年泛自閉症者提供持續創作的避風港。林正盛導演也從那時開始，記錄他們的日常。本片透過對四位泛自閉者近身的紀錄，觀察他們與同儕、親人和老師的互動，呈現他們與生俱來不同於一般人情感表達方式的獨特生命狀態。 https://reurl.cc/V2EmY5
synopsis_en:
★ 2021 Golden Horse Film Festival

People with autism are naturally unable to understand or learn conventional ways of expressing emotion, making it difficult for them to navigate the complex social interactions of mainstream society. However, they often fixate on specific interests, demonstrating unique talents in fields such as painting, music, and writing. For over a decade, teacher Han Shu-hua has taught painting to individuals with autism, constantly amazed by the unique aesthetic styles of these "stars in the daytime." In 2003, she founded the Duo Bao Art School to provide a creative sanctuary for adults on the autism spectrum. Director Lin Cheng-sheng has been documenting their daily lives since then. Through intimate observation of four individuals, the film explores their interactions with peers, family, and teachers, revealing a unique state of existence and an innate emotional language that differs from the world at large.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】馬拉庫達大冒險

synopsis: 探險家徐仁修用50年行走荒野雨林，透過鏡頭與文字記錄自然的壯麗與脆弱。他不只是觀察者，更是與自然共生的行者。 然而，2019 年，他歷經人生首次手術，身體發出時間的警訊，也啟動一場他稱為「最後的探險」，深入亞馬遜，只為追尋夢想多年的藍閃蝶。
synopsis_en: Explorer Hsu Jen-hsiu has spent 50 years traversing the wild rainforests, documenting the majesty and fragility of nature through his lens and writings. He is more than just an observer; he is a traveler who lives in harmony with the natural world. However, in 2019, he underwent his first surgery—a warning from his body that time was catching up. This sparked what he calls his "Final Adventure," a journey deep into the Amazon in pursuit of the Blue Morpho butterfly, a dream he has held for many years.

This screening anchors her debut feature,
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
**A Very Easy Death**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1975｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜9min

**Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1974｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜19min

**Shades of Silk**
Mary STEPHEN｜France, Canada｜1978｜DCP｜Color｜62min

2025 Toronto IFF
2025 New York FF
2026 IFF Rotterdam

Long before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer’s long-time editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to capture the displacement of the diaspora, the struggle for identity, and the growing pains of coming of age. This screening features four of her early works, including her debut feature *Shades of Silk* and three rare shorts of distinct styles—*Labyrinth*, *A Very Easy Death*, and *Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite*. Through the interplay of sound and image, Stephen transforms personal experience into evocative visual poetry. From a Canadian road-trip baptism and the somniloquy of a Parisian student dorm to a quiet gaze at death, her imagery is as delicate and resilient as silk. These works serve as memory fragments drifting between Eastern and Western cultures, documenting her perception and search for selfhood.

synopsis: 1941 奧斯卡金像獎最佳影片、黑白攝影 Best Picture & Best Cinematography (Black-and-White), Academy Awards 2018 美國國家電影保護局典藏影片 National Film Registry, National Film Preservation Board 妙齡女子在異地邂逅英國紳士，墜入情網後旋即閃婚，隨丈夫返回康沃爾郡的宏偉莊園。豈料古宅並非蜜月愛巢，而是男人亡妻幽影徘徊的迷宮：從擺設、舊衣到房間每個角落，都彷彿低語她的存在。少婦深陷焦慮，冷若冰霜的女管家更時時提醒：她永遠無法取代前任女主人。當一艘失事船隻被打撈上岸，莊園深藏的謊言與死亡謎團，也悄然浮出水面。 希區考克首部美國電影，改編杜莫里哀1938年的同名小說，以高對比黑白光影重現驚悚迷情，在海斯法典的嚴格限制下觸及婚內出軌、女女情愫等禁忌。女作家杜莫里哀乃哥德羅曼史名家，文風不僅啟發《地獄新娘》的原著小說《米蘭夫人》，更一度被誤認為該書的真正作者。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Winner of the 1941 Academy Awards for Best Picture and Best Cinematography (Black-and-White), and selected for preservation in the National Film Registry in 2018. 

A young woman meets a British gentleman in a foreign land, falls head over heels, and marries him in a whirlwind romance. However, upon returning to his grand estate in Cornwall, she discovers the ancient manor is no honeymoon nest, but a labyrinth haunted by the shadow of his late wife. From the furnishings and old clothes to every corner of the house, everything seems to whisper her presence. As the young bride sinks into anxiety, the ice-cold housekeeper constantly reminds her that she can never replace her predecessor. When a shipwreck is salvaged and brought ashore, the lies and mysteries of death hidden deep within the estate begin to surface.

Alfred Hitchcock’s first American film, adapted from Daphne du Maurier’s 1938 novel of the same name, uses high-contrast black-and-white cinematography to recreate a world of suspense and obsession. Despite the strict constraints of the Hays Code, the film subtly touches on taboos such as marital infidelity and lesbian undertones. Du Maurier, a master of Gothic romance, possessed a style so influential that it inspired the novel *Mistress of Milan* (the basis for *Corpse Bride*) and even led some to believe she was its true author.

synopsis: ★2024 SCHLiNGEL兒少影展兒童電影類最佳國際劇情片、最佳兒童演員鑽石獎；兒童評審團最佳影片、一般評審團最佳影片等5項提名 ★2025 魁北克電影節最佳影片、最佳男主角等6項提名 ★《臭皮匠發財夢》、《星叭克超有種》安托萬貝特朗領銜主演 菲利普是一位缺乏靈感的歌劇作曲家，他被迫收留他的侄女西蒙娜，一個叛逆、古怪的孤兒，而她的最好的朋友是一隻臭鼬。儘管性格截然相反，菲利普和西蒙娜很快就發現，他們可能比最初想像的更需要彼此。 https://reurl.cc/X2WpGR

Philippe is an uninspired opera composer forced to take in his niece, Simone, a rebellious and eccentric orphan whose best friend is a skunk. Despite their polar opposite personalities, Philippe and Simone soon discover that they might need each other more than they ever imagined.

synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
The swordsman Jin Shange originally intended to serve his country by joining the ranks of Marshal Zhang Zhe. However, he was framed for the murder of the Prime Minister's son and sentenced to exile at the frontier. During his transport, the escort was ambushed by Jin soldiers; in the chaos, Jin Shange broke free from his shackles, defeated the enemy, and escaped.

Meanwhile, Marshal Zhang Zhe was killed by the Jin commander, Wanyan. The Marshal's daughter, Enzhu, managed to flee to Lu Village with the help of Wang Feng. Seeking vengeance, they began recruiting heroes to their cause. Jin Shange happened to pass by their martial arts tournament, where his peerless skills impressed Wang Feng, who invited him to join the resistance against the Jin invaders. Jin Shange readily agreed, but on one condition: he must marry Enzhu. To avenge her father, Enzhu consented, provided that Jin Shange first return with Wanyan’s head.

Jin Shange initially presents himself as a decadent, roguish, and even lecherous figure, subverting the traditional "chivalrous hero" archetype of wuxia cinema. As the group unites to fight the Jin, this unconventional warrior gradually redeems his image, ultimately making a stylish, solitary exit reminiscent of a classic Western hero.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1986 日本藍絲帶獎最佳影片 Best Film, Blue Ribbon Awards 1986 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男配角 Best Film, Director, 1986 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳服裝設計獲獎；最佳導演、攝影、美術設計提名 戰國大名一文字秀虎曾經縱橫沙場、不可一世，年逾七十後卻常感力不從心，決意退位養老。未料將城池分給三兄弟後，長子隨即翻臉羞辱，逼他出走，次子也暗謀逆反，冷眼相待。唯因直言敢諫而被逐出家門的三子，不僅暗中派人護駕，更溫暖迎納流亡老父。目睹家系骨肉相殘，心受過往惡業折磨，梟雄秀虎漸成瘋魔，無語能對命運荒波。 角色設定與《影武者》天地對望並更臻化境，將莎翁悲劇《李爾王》縫入日本戰國時代，仲代達矢以深厚演劇功底創造極強情緒渲染力，堪稱本片宏偉史詩氣韻最重要的元素。劇組雖沿用了《影武者》的服裝與道具，仍耗資千萬美金調度浩大戰爭場面，刷新當時日本影史最高拍攝成本，也成就黑澤明匯聚畢生心血的顛峰之作。

synopsis_en:
1986 Blue Ribbon Awards: Best Film
1986 Mainichi Film Awards: Best Film, Best Director, Best Supporting Actor
1986 Academy Awards: Winner for Best Costume Design; Nominated for Best Director, Best Cinematography, and Best Art Direction

Lord Hidetora Ichimonji, a Sengoku-era warlord who once dominated the battlefield with peerless authority, finds himself weary and aging at seventy. He decides to abdicate and divide his castles among his three sons. However, his eldest son immediately turns against him, subjecting him to humiliation and forcing him into exile. His second son also plots betrayal, treating his father with cold indifference. Only the third son—who was banished for his blunt honesty—secretly sends protection and warmly welcomes his exiled father. Witnessing the bloody fratricide of his lineage and tormented by the sins of his past, the once-mighty Hidetora descends into madness, silenced by the cruel tides of fate.

A thematic counterpart to *Kagemusha* that reaches even greater artistic heights, the film masterfully weaves Shakespeare’s tragedy *King Lear* into the Japanese Warring States period. Tatsuya Nakadai’s profound acting creates an intense emotional resonance, serving as the cornerstone of the film’s grand epic spirit. Although the production reused costumes and props from *Kagemusha*, it still cost $10 million to stage its massive battle sequences—a record-breaking budget in Japanese cinema at the time. The result is Akira Kurosawa’s ultimate masterpiece, the culmination of a lifetime of cinematic mastery.

synopsis: ★2025 尤西獎最佳突破角色提名 ★《女性日常》導演珍妮托沃涅米最新作品 在芬蘭熱鬧的夏季，29歲的西莉和她樂觀的父親彼得里在探戈節上展開了一場觀念對決，西莉總說「不」，而彼得里總說「是」，兩人性格南轅北轍，誤會和意外層出不窮，西莉忙碌處理老闆的婚姻危機；彼得里則掩飾內心混亂，用優雅的探戈假裝一切正常，當最後一支探戈落幕，冰冷的現實迫使他們正視彼此的謊言。 https://reurl.cc/GamQgA
synopsis_en:
★ 2025 Jussi Award Nomination for Best Breakthrough Performance
★ The latest film from Jenni Toivoniemi, director of *Force of Habit*

In the heat of the Finnish summer, 29-year-old Sili and her optimistic father, Petri, find themselves in a clash of perspectives at a tango festival. Sili is a habitual "no," while Petri is a perpetual "yes." Their polar-opposite personalities lead to a constant stream of misunderstandings and mishaps; while Sili is preoccupied with managing her boss's marital crisis, Petri masks his inner turmoil, using the elegance of the tango to maintain a facade of normalcy. As the final dance comes to an end, cold reality forces them to finally confront the lies they’ve been telling each other.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★孫耀威、方力申領銜主演 香港有一所另類的「國際學校」名叫勵志中學。大部分的學生以南亞裔為主，其中也包括內地新移民和成績較差的本地學生。學生操行問題、教學支援不足等惡劣條件，令學校師生間氣氛長期處在緊張狀態。為提升學生們對學校的歸屬感，ParkSir（孫耀威飾）及MissLaw（葉芷如飾）藉著每年一度的校際才藝大賽，希望讓6E班的同學能學會團隊合作，同時打破學生之間的種族隔閡。然而，就在練習進行得如火如荼之際，幾個學生陸續出現各種問題...... https://reurl.cc/4laqvV
synopsis_en:
(Note: Rated PG-12) Starring Eric Suen and Alex Fong.

In Hong Kong, there is an unconventional "international school" called Inspirational Secondary School. The student body is primarily composed of South Asian youths, alongside new immigrants from Mainland China and local students with poor academic performance. Due to behavioral issues and a lack of educational support, the atmosphere between teachers and students has long been fraught with tension. To foster a sense of belonging and break down racial barriers, Park Sir (Eric Suen) and Miss Law (Yip Tsz-yu) look to the annual inter-school talent competition, hoping to teach the students of Class 6E the value of teamwork. However, just as rehearsals are in full swing, several students begin to face a series of unexpected challenges...

movie_title: 家庭檔案影像的轉生與收納
synopsis: 每個家庭都囤積了許多曾經風行一時的影音媒材，如 16mm、8mm 膠卷、VHS、DV、DVD等等，乘載了家庭回憶、活動紀錄、個人歷史軌跡等等，但在播放設備難以取得的現今，似乎唯有轉換成電腦檔案才容易被觀賞與重新記憶。 / 本活動除了介紹這些載體如何可能被轉化成電腦檔案，也討論數位檔案與原始媒材呈現上的差異、保存上的不同，以及試想在搜集與轉換載體的過程中，建構自己的資料庫的可能性。本活動備有16mm與8mm投影機，如有需求歡迎參與者攜帶自己的影片。
screen_name: 牯嶺街小劇場 二樓藝文空間（臺北市中正區牯嶺街5巷2號）
synopsis_en:
Every household has a collection of once-popular audiovisual media—16mm and 8mm film, VHS tapes, DVs, and DVDs—that hold family memories, event recordings, and personal histories. However, in an era where playback equipment is increasingly hard to find, digitizing these formats seems to be the only way to ensure they can be easily viewed and remembered.

In addition to introducing how these formats can be converted into digital files, this event will explore the differences in presentation and preservation between digital files and original media. We will also discuss the potential for building a personal archive through the process of collecting and converting these materials. 16mm and 8mm projectors will be available on-site; participants are welcome to bring their own films if they wish.

cinema_name: 臺灣當代文化實驗場 C-LAB
movie_title: 家庭檔案影像的轉生與收納
synopsis: 每個家庭都囤積了許多曾經風行一時的影音媒材，如16mm、8mm膠卷、VHS、DV、DVD等等，乘載了家庭回憶、活動紀錄、個人歷史軌跡等等，但在播放設備難以取得的現今，似乎唯有轉換成電腦檔案才容易被觀賞與重新記憶。本活動除了介紹這些載體如何可能被轉化成電腦檔案，也討論數位檔案與原始媒材呈現上的差異、保存上的不同，以及試想在搜集與轉換載體的過程中，建構自己的資料庫的可能性。本活動備有16mm與8mm投影機，如有需求歡迎參與者攜帶自己的影片。 時間｜2026/04/24(Fri.) 19:30 - 21:00 地點｜牯嶺街小劇場 二樓藝文空間（臺北市中正區牯嶺街5巷2號） 講師｜吳梓安（實驗電影藝術家）、張新寧（國家電影及視聽文化中心放映人員） 報名｜ ACCUPASS 講師 ｜吳梓安 吳梓安從事實驗電影的創作、推廣、研究與擴延。他以Super 8和16mm膠卷的技法，拼貼異質的影像、聲音與文本進行創作，質問電影敘事與自我建構。作品呈現形式包括放映，展覽與表演。他也是目聶映像文化與實驗電影團體後照鏡的創始成員，參與策劃各種實驗電影映演活動。 ｜張新寧 張新寧畢業於美國俄亥俄大學跨領域藝術學院博士學位，曾在俄亥俄州亞森市Athena Cinema與德州奧斯汀市AFS Cinema擔任放映人員。回台後曾任職於台灣國際女性影展，之後至影視聽中心樹林片庫擔任膠卷整飭人員，現為影視聽中心場館影廳放映人員。 本活動備有 16mm、8mm 投影機，學員可攜帶自己的影片至現場投放 ▶ 主辦單位：文化部、臺灣當代文化實驗場、亞洲藝術文獻庫、牯嶺街小劇場 ▶ 主辦單位保有調整與變更活動之權利。

synopsis: ★《名偵探柯南》劇場版第26部 ★ 2024日本電影學院獎最佳動畫電影提名 位於東京八丈島的海洋設施「太平洋浮標」，準備啟動連結各地警察機構的即時監視器系統，臉部辨識的新技術也同時進行了測試。柯南接到沖矢昴的電話得知歐洲刑警在德國被琴酒殺害。此時設施內女工程師慘遭黑暗組織綁架，紀錄某個重要情報的USB也落入組織手中。而在八丈島的灰原身旁也有可疑黑影悄悄接近…... https://reurl.cc/A9kpm8
synopsis_en:
★ The 26th feature film in the "Detective Conan" series ★
Nominated for Best Animation Film at the 2024 Japan Academy Film Prize.

At "Pacific Buoy," an offshore facility located near Tokyo’s Hachijo-jima island, preparations are underway to launch a real-time surveillance system connecting police agencies worldwide. At the same time, a new facial recognition technology is being tested. Conan receives a call from Subaru Okiya, informing him that an Interpol agent has been murdered in Germany by Gin. Meanwhile, a female engineer is kidnapped from the facility by the Black Organization, and a USB drive containing critical information falls into their hands. As the danger escalates, a mysterious shadow silently creeps toward Haibara on Hachijo-jima...

synopsis: 相依為命的太菲鴨與豬小弟發現家裡屋頂破了一個大洞，經豬小妞介紹輾轉來到口香糖製造工廠打工賺維修費，竟無意間發現新上架的粉紅色泡泡糖，會讓吃過的人都變成殭屍！經三人調查，竟發現這都是邪惡外星人「魔人泡泡」的陰謀，這群「豬隊友」也成為拯救末日的唯一希望，史上最危險的太空救援任務即將展開！
synopsis_en: Roommates Daffy Duck and Porky Pig discover a massive hole in their roof and, thanks to a lead from Petunia Pig, land jobs at a bubblegum factory to earn the repair money. However, they accidentally discover that the new pink bubblegum hitting the shelves turns anyone who eats it into a zombie! Their investigation reveals a sinister plot by the evil alien "Mojo Jojo," leaving this ragtag team as the world's only hope. The most dangerous space rescue mission in history is about to begin!

movie_title: 芭比與胡桃鉗的夢幻之旅
synopsis: 芭比飾演克萊拉，在聖誕夜收到阿姨送給她的胡桃 鉗 士兵 。夜晚，當家人都入睡時，邪惡的老鼠國王帶著軍隊闖入克萊拉的客廳，原本不會動的胡桃鉗突然活過來，對抗入侵的敵人。激烈的戰鬥驚醒了克萊拉，她起身幫忙，卻被老鼠國王用邪惡魔法變小！為了破解魔咒，克萊拉與胡桃鉗進入奇幻的世界，展開精彩的冒險，尋找糖糖公主讓一切恢復原狀。 童話故事和古典音樂結合，創作出奇幻又典雅的芭比世界。這是芭比的首部動畫電影，在改編自霍夫曼經典原著《胡桃鉗與鼠王》的影片中，芭比隨著柴可夫斯基著名芭蕾舞劇《胡桃鉗》的舞曲，和胡桃鉗在夢幻王國中翩翩起舞。

synopsis_en:
Barbie stars as Clara, who receives a wooden Nutcracker soldier from her aunt on Christmas Eve. That night, while the rest of the family is asleep, the evil Mouse King and his army invade Clara’s living room. Suddenly, the Nutcracker springs to life to fend off the invaders. The fierce battle wakes Clara, and as she rushes to help, the Mouse King casts an evil spell that shrinks her! To break the curse, Clara and the Nutcracker embark on a spectacular adventure through a fantasy world, searching for the Sugarplum Princess to set everything right.

Blending fairy tales with classical music, this film creates a magical and elegant Barbie world. In Barbie’s first-ever animated movie, adapted from E.T.A. Hoffmann’s classic "The Nutcracker and the Mouse King," Barbie dances through a dreamlike kingdom with the Nutcracker to the iconic music of Tchaikovsky’s famous ballet.

synopsis: 1986 日本藍絲帶獎最佳影片 Best Film, Blue Ribbon Awards 1986 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男配角 Best Film, Director, 1986 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳服裝設計獲獎；最佳導演、攝影、美術設計提名 戰國大名一文字秀虎曾經縱橫沙場、不可一世，年逾七十後卻常感力不從心，決意退位養老。未料將城池分給三兄弟後，長子隨即翻臉羞辱，逼他出走，次子也暗謀逆反，冷眼相待。唯因直言敢諫而被逐出家門的三子，不僅暗中派人護駕，更溫暖迎納流亡老父。目睹家系骨肉相殘，心受過往惡業折磨，梟雄秀虎漸成瘋魔，無語能對命運荒波。 角色設定與《影武者》天地對望並更臻化境，將莎翁悲劇《李爾王》縫入日本戰國時代，仲代達矢以深厚演劇功底創造極強情緒渲染力，堪稱本片宏偉史詩氣韻最重要的元素。劇組雖沿用了《影武者》的服裝與道具，仍耗資千萬美金調度浩大戰爭場面，刷新當時日本影史最高拍攝成本，也成就黑澤明匯聚畢生心血的顛峰之作。

screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
1986 Blue Ribbon Awards: Best Film
1986 Mainichi Film Awards: Best Film, Best Director, Best Supporting Actor
1986 Academy Awards: Winner for Best Costume Design; Nominated for Best Director, Best Cinematography, and Best Art Direction

Lord Hidetora Ichimonji, a Sengoku-era warlord who once dominated the battlefield with peerless authority, finds himself weary and aging at seventy. He decides to abdicate and divide his castles among his three sons. However, his eldest son immediately turns against him, subjecting him to humiliation and forcing him into exile. His second son also plots betrayal, treating his father with cold indifference. Only the third son—who was banished for his blunt honesty—secretly sends protection and warmly welcomes his exiled father. Witnessing the bloody fratricide of his lineage and tormented by the sins of his past, the once-mighty Hidetora descends into madness, silenced by the cruel tides of fate.

A thematic counterpart to *Kagemusha* that reaches even greater artistic heights, the film masterfully weaves Shakespeare’s tragedy *King Lear* into the Japanese Warring States period. Tatsuya Nakadai’s profound acting creates an intense emotional resonance, serving as the cornerstone of the film’s grand epic spirit. Although the production reused costumes and props from *Kagemusha*, it still cost $10 million to stage its massive battle sequences—a record-breaking budget in Japanese cinema at the time. The result is Akira Kurosawa’s ultimate masterpiece, the culmination of a lifetime of cinematic mastery.

movie_title_en: The Texture of Memory: Films by Mary Stephen
synopsis: 安詳辭世 A Very Easy Death 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1975｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜9min 大加拿大成人禮 Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1974｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜19min 絲之影 Shades of Silk 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜法國 France﹑加拿大 Canada｜1978｜DCP ｜Color｜62min 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 紐約影展 New York FF 2026 鹿特丹影展 IFF Rotterdam 在成為法國新浪潮大師艾力侯麥御用剪輯師前，雪美蓮早已透過鏡頭，捕捉流散者在異鄉與故土間的徘徊﹑身分認同的掙扎與成長陣痛。本次放映的四部早期作品，包括首部長片《絲之影》，以及三部風格迥異的珍稀短片——《迷宮》﹑《安詳辭世》﹑《大加拿大成人禮》，雪美蓮藉由音畫，將個人經歷化為感性的詩篇。 從加拿大的公路洗禮、巴黎學生宿舍的夢囈，到面對死亡的靜謐凝視，她的影像如絲綢般細膩且充滿韌性。這些作品如遊走於東西方文化之間的記憶碎片，以鏡頭記錄其對自我身份的感知和探求。 Before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer's editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to record a series of rites of passage. This screening anchors her debut feature,
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
**A Very Easy Death**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1975｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜9min

**Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1974｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜19min

**Shades of Silk**
Mary STEPHEN｜France, Canada｜1978｜DCP｜Color｜62min

2025 Toronto IFF
2025 New York FF
2026 IFF Rotterdam

Long before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer’s long-time editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to capture the displacement of the diaspora, the struggle for identity, and the growing pains of coming of age. This screening features four of her early works, including her debut feature *Shades of Silk* and three rare shorts of distinct styles—*Labyrinth*, *A Very Easy Death*, and *Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite*. Through the interplay of sound and image, Stephen transforms personal experience into evocative visual poetry. From a Canadian road-trip baptism and the somniloquy of a Parisian student dorm to a quiet gaze at death, her imagery is as delicate and resilient as silk. These works serve as memory fragments drifting between Eastern and Western cultures, documenting her perception and search for selfhood.

movie_title_en: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
synopsis: ★1993 尼克頻道兒童選擇獎最受歡迎演員提名 ★1993 全美民選獎最受歡迎喜劇類電影 ★全球票房3.5億美元 凱文獨自一人在紐約，但是口袋裡有足夠的錢，整個城市都是他的遊樂場！但是這孤獨不會持續太久，因為臭名昭著的竊賊哈里和馬夫也來到了紐約，他們沒有忘記上次和凱文的交鋒，這次還策劃了一場假日大盜竊。但凱文也準備了迎接他們的到來，設計了一連串厲害的裝置，這些笨蛋盜賊們將永生難忘！ https://reurl.cc/EmnW9k

Kevin is all alone in New York City, and with plenty of cash in his pocket, the entire city is his playground! But his solitude won't last long—the notorious burglars Harry and Marv have also arrived in New York. They haven't forgotten their last encounter with Kevin and are now plotting a massive holiday heist. However, Kevin is ready for them, having designed a series of ingenious traps that these bumbling thieves will never forget!

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
Toronto IFF 2025
IDFA 2025
Golden Horse Awards: Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing

Veteran editor Mary Stephen possesses a distinctly East Asian face yet bears a Western surname: Stephen. Delving into her family’s little-known history through her father’s journals, she discovers that both her parents lived under assumed names with pasts where truth and fiction blur. Her father appears to be a descendant of Australian Aboriginal fishermen, while her mother—a woman who once harbored literary dreams—seems to have had a subtle connection to a romance in China involving a member of Virginia Woolf’s family.

In her quest to uncover the origins of the "Stephen" name, she sifts through home movies and old photographs, reconstructing a private family history that feels truer than reality itself amidst an era of colonial expansion and upheaval. Navigating a maze of multiple narratives, she interrogates her own identity, exploring how individuals can find flight once more through the fog of diaspora by rewriting their own history. Together, she pieces together a profound cinematic portrait of life spanning borders and a century of global change.

synopsis: 「保齡球的最大優點是，不管上次有沒有全倒，下一局又是全新的開始！」對於在海邊小村莊生活了一輩子的娜英來說，最重要的事情就是照顧家人。然而，母親正試圖賣掉充滿回憶的珍貴房子，而弟弟也執意要去首爾生活。當娜英努力接受生活突如其來的改變與迷惘，保齡球正好來到了娜英身邊。娜英開始花越來越多的時間在保齡球館。被保齡球的魅力打動，在學習保齡球的過程中逐漸打開心扉，重新對生活充滿希望。
synopsis_en: "The best thing about bowling is that no matter if you got a strike last time, the next frame is always a fresh start." For Na-young, who has lived in a small seaside village her entire life, nothing is more important than taking care of her family. However, her world begins to shift as her mother tries to sell their cherished home filled with memories, and her younger brother insists on moving to Seoul. As Na-young struggles to navigate these sudden changes and her own sense of uncertainty, bowling unexpectedly enters her life. Spending more and more time at the bowling alley, she becomes captivated by the sport. Through learning the game, she gradually opens her heart and finds a renewed sense of hope for the future.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
synopsis_en: ☀️ I hope the weather is good. See you on the rooftop.

movie_title: 2001太空漫遊─早安！周日經典電影院

synopsis: ★1983 奧斯卡最佳原創配樂、最佳音效等四項大獎；最佳影片、最佳導演等5項提名 ★1983 金球獎戲劇類最佳影片、最佳原創配樂；最佳導演、最佳劇本等3項提名 ★1983 土星獎最佳科幻電影、最佳編劇5項大獎；最佳導演、最佳男主角等3項提名 渴望父愛的平凡男孩艾略特，與家人過著尋常的日子，直到外型怪異的小外星人E.T. 闖進他的生活，改變了彼此的命運。兩個有所缺憾的靈魂，相互牽引聯繫，建立起一段不尋常卻無比真摯的友誼。然而好景不常，E.T. 的存在被大人發現了，為了幫助「他」逃離科學家與政府特工的追捕，順利坐上太空船回家，艾略特與哥哥妹妹聯手，一行人騎上腳踏車四下逃竄引開警方，展開一連串奇幻的追趕跑跳與飛行冒險…... https://reurl.cc/R208ax
synopsis_en:
★ 1983 Academy Awards: 4 wins including Best Original Score and Best Sound; 5 nominations including Best Picture and Best Director.
★ 1983 Golden Globe Awards: Best Motion Picture – Drama and Best Original Score; 3 nominations including Best Director and Best Screenplay.
★ 1983 Saturn Awards: 5 wins including Best Science Fiction Film and Best Writing; 3 nominations including Best Director and Best Actor.

Elliot, an ordinary boy longing for a father’s love, lives a routine life with his family until a strange-looking little alien, E.T., wanders into his world, changing both their destinies forever. Two lonely souls find themselves drawn together, forging an unusual yet profoundly sincere friendship. However, their bond is threatened when adults discover E.T.’s existence. To help him escape the clutches of scientists and government agents and return safely to his spaceship, Elliot teams up with his brother and sister. Mounting their bicycles to outrun the police, the group embarks on a series of fantastical chases and soaring adventures.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 人間的條件  第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇
movie_title_en: Human Condition I: No Greater Love
synopsis: 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第五名）、最佳女演員 Top 10 Japanese Films (5th Place) & Best Actress, Kinema Junpo 1960 威尼斯影展聖喬治獎 San Giorgio Prize, Venice FF 1960 威尼斯影展帕西內蒂獎 Premio Pasinetti, Venice FF 1943年，懷抱人道主義理想的梶，偕同妻子美千子前往滿洲老虎嶺礦場，出任戰時勞工監工一職。他試圖在殖民體制內推行改革、改善戰俘待遇，卻屢遭官僚排擠與軍方威壓，亦無法取信於遭受虐待的中國勞工。戰爭機器不斷剝奪選擇的可能，梶的處境愈發孤立，該如何讓所有人保有生存的尊嚴？他又如何保有身而為人的良心？ 甫出茅廬的仲代達矢繼《黑河》後二度與小林正樹合作，以正氣而克制的表演詮釋梶的進退兩難，為仲代演藝之路的大躍進。這部現實主義鉅作乃小林正樹改編五味川純平的同名小說，為日本反戰電影的巔峰之作。攝影師宮島義勇的固定鏡頭與黑白寬銀幕攝影，形塑了沉穩莊重的視覺風格，使這部影像史詩回歸冷靜凜然的現實凝視。 In 1943, Kaji, guided by humanist ideals, travels with his wife to a mining site in Manchuria to serve as a wartime labor supervisor, attempting to reform an oppressive colonial system from within. Caught between military authority, bureaucratic pressure, and the distrust of abused Chinese laborers, his efforts only deepen his isolation. Faithfully adapted from Gomikawa Junpei's novel, Kobayashi Masaki's austere antiwar epic employs fixed camera compositions and black-and-white widescreen cinematography to stage a relentless moral inquiry—asking what dignity, and humanity itself, can mean under the machinery of war.
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Top 10 Japanese Films (5th Place) & Best Actress, Kinema Junpo 1960
San Giorgio Prize & Premio Pasinetti, Venice Film Festival 1960

In 1943, Kaji, a man driven by humanist ideals, travels with his wife Michiko to the Tiger Ridge mine in Manchuria to serve as a wartime labor supervisor. He attempts to reform the colonial system from within and improve the treatment of prisoners of war, but he is constantly marginalized by bureaucrats and pressured by the military, all while failing to win the trust of the mistreated Chinese laborers. As the machinery of war relentlessly strips away his choices, Kaji finds himself increasingly isolated. How can he protect the dignity of those around him? And how can he preserve his own conscience as a human being?

Following *Black River*, a young Tatsuya Nakadai collaborates with director Masaki Kobayashi for the second time. His righteous and restrained performance captures Kaji’s impossible dilemma, marking a major breakthrough in his acting career. This realist masterpiece, adapted from Junpei Gomikawa’s novel of the same name, stands as a pinnacle of Japanese anti-war cinema. Cinematographer Yoshio Miyajima’s static shots and black-and-white widescreen photography establish a steady, solemn visual style, grounding this cinematic epic in a cold and piercing gaze at reality.

synopsis: 偷技高超的神偷唐姆柯比，對客戶委託的偷竊行動無往不利，但其行蹤卻涉遍最驚險、最神秘的潛意識範圍，他的目標是趁對象進入深沉的睡眠、心智遂呈現最脆弱狀態時，入侵其潛意識，將不可告人的機密手到擒來。天賦異稟加上高科技儀器，使柯比周旋於企業間的爾虞我詐，成為不二人想的商業間諜，相對也付出極大代價，不但淪為國際逃犯，也失去所愛的家人。因緣際會，柯比遇到一個平反的契機，能重新找回到失去的人生。
synopsis_en: Dom Cobb is a master thief, unparalleled in the high-stakes world of corporate espionage. His specialty lies in the most dangerous and mysterious realm: the subconscious. He infiltrates the minds of his targets while they are in their most vulnerable state—deep sleep—to steal their most guarded secrets. This extraordinary talent, combined with cutting-edge technology, has made him the ultimate prize in the world of corporate intrigue, but it has come at a devastating cost. Now an international fugitive, Cobb has lost the family he loves. However, a rare opportunity for redemption arises, offering him one last chance to reclaim the life he lost.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: The Bride Who Has Returned from Hell (Restored)
synopsis: 華僑瑞美聽聞姊姊溺斃海中，隱瞞身分悄然返台，住進姊夫家擔任外甥女家教，暗中追查死因。朝夕相處間，她不僅修補外甥女的父女關係，亦與姊夫萌生情愫。鬼影幢幢的大宅、死者遺留的日記、錯綜的情愛糾葛……逐漸拼湊真相。當姊夫向她求婚，一場致命陰謀卻在婚禮前夕爆發。 英國女作家荷特承襲勃朗特姊妹、杜莫里哀等人文風，1960年以哥德羅曼史小說《米蘭夫人》聲名大噪，當年台灣報紙連載譯文後由皇冠出版社集結成冊，引發西洋羅曼史熱潮。辛奇將書中英式懸疑浪漫移植為淡水本土風情，成熟洗鍊的調度及運鏡，不僅展現工業水準，更印證台語影人不只能拍悲情通俗劇，更具備駕馭國際類型、文學改編的多元視野。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
Upon hearing that her sister has drowned, Rui-mei, an overseas Chinese woman, returns to Taiwan in secret. Concealing her true identity, she moves into her brother-in-law’s home as a tutor for her niece, determined to uncover the truth behind the tragedy. As they spend their days together, she not only helps mend the fractured bond between father and daughter but also finds herself falling for her brother-in-law. Amidst the shadows of a haunted mansion, the discovery of a secret diary, and a web of tangled emotions, the truth slowly begins to emerge. But just as her brother-in-law proposes, a deadly conspiracy erupts on the eve of their wedding.

Drawing inspiration from the Brontë sisters and Daphne du Maurier, British author Victoria Holt rose to fame in 1960 with her Gothic romance *Mistress of Mellyn*. After its serialization in Taiwanese newspapers and subsequent publication by Crown Press, the novel ignited a craze for Western romance across the island. Director Hsin Chi masterfully transplants the British suspense and romance of the original novel into the local atmosphere of Tamsui. With sophisticated staging and cinematography, the film not only demonstrates high production standards but also proves that Taiwanese filmmakers were capable of far more than just tragic melodramas—showcasing their ability to master international genres and literary adaptations with a diverse creative vision.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
The swordsman Jin Shange originally intended to serve his country by joining the ranks of Marshal Zhang Zhe. However, he was framed for the murder of the Prime Minister's son and sentenced to exile at the frontier. During his transport, the escort was ambushed by Jin soldiers; in the chaos, Jin Shange broke free from his shackles, defeated the enemy, and escaped.

Meanwhile, Marshal Zhang Zhe was killed by the Jin commander, Wanyan. The Marshal's daughter, Enzhu, managed to flee to Lu Village with the help of Wang Feng. Seeking vengeance, they began recruiting heroes to their cause. Jin Shange happened to pass by their martial arts tournament, where his peerless skills impressed Wang Feng, who invited him to join the resistance against the Jin invaders. Jin Shange readily agreed, but on one condition: he must marry Enzhu. To avenge her father, Enzhu consented, provided that Jin Shange first return with Wanyan’s head.

Jin Shange initially presents himself as a decadent, roguish, and even lecherous figure, subverting the traditional "chivalrous hero" archetype of wuxia cinema. As the group unites to fight the Jin, this unconventional warrior gradually redeems his image, ultimately making a stylish, solitary exit reminiscent of a classic Western hero.

synopsis_en: I hope the weather is beautiful. See you on the rooftop.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
synopsis: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴 兼 妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。 導演 稻 塚秀孝歷時一年多貼身跟拍，聚焦無名塾的訓練過程及劇場公演，穿插仲代和弟子的訪談，記錄他鮮為人知的一面。拍攝時，仲代已年屆80，仍毅然佇立於心愛的舞台，與日漸衰退的記性和體力抗衡。 他 始終懷抱身為無名小卒時的初心，貫徹此生志向──為演員而活，並將這份信念傳承給下個世代。
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
In 1975, Tatsuya Nakadai and his creative partner and wife, Kyoko Miyazaki, co-founded the acting school Mumeijuku. Nakadai personally oversees talent selection and intensive training, maintaining a rigorous schedule from 6 a.m. to 8 p.m. When performing, he suppresses his own presence, allowing only the character to collide with his scene partner. Mumeijuku does more than just train actors; it cultivates "human beings" capable of standing on their own in the world, producing a steady stream of talent for 50 years. Yet, beneath his roles as a teacher and a performer, Nakadai’s true self is that of a humble actor who hand-copies his lines with a calligraphy brush and pastes them on his bedroom walls for constant memorization. 

Director Hidetaka Inozuka spent over a year following Nakadai, capturing the training process at Mumeijuku and its theatrical performances. Interspersed with interviews with Nakadai and his disciples, the film documents a side of him rarely seen by the public. At the time of filming, Nakadai was in his 80s, yet he remained steadfast on his beloved stage, battling a fading memory and declining physical strength. He continues to embrace the "beginner’s mind" of his early days as a "nobody," fulfilling his life’s mission—to live for the craft of acting—and passing this conviction on to the next generation.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
synopsis_en: I hope the weather is beautiful. See you on the rooftop.

synopsis: ★2016 印度覺醒電影節最佳女主角、最佳新導演 ★2017 印度電影觀眾獎最佳新導演 ★2017 寶萊塢電影記者獎最佳影片、最佳導演等4項提名 單親媽媽晨妲自從丈夫過世之後，一肩扛起撫養女兒阿佩莎的責任，為了讓女兒獲得最好的資源，晨妲四處奔波不遺餘力！但是，看著女兒在學校交到壞朋友，心中總是煩惱女兒不小心誤入歧途。這天，班上來了一位新同學，她叫晨妲，她要和大家交朋友，一起上課學習！ https://reurl.cc/ppgXye
synopsis_en:
★ 2016 Jagran Film Festival: Best Actress, Best Debut Director
★ 2017 Filmfare Awards: Best Debut Director
★ 2017 Bollywood Movie Journalists Awards: 4 nominations including Best Film and Best Director

Single mother Chanda has shouldered the responsibility of raising her daughter, Apeksha, alone ever since her husband passed away. To ensure her daughter has access to the best resources, Chanda works tirelessly, going to any length for her future. However, seeing Apeksha fall in with the wrong crowd at school, Chanda constantly worries that her daughter might go astray. Then one day, a new student joins the class—her name is Chanda, and she’s there to make friends and study right alongside everyone else!

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 烏克蘭 Ukraine、美國 United States、英國 United Kingdom
synopsis: 俄烏戰爭爆發之際，為了貼身記錄戰場，導演自願入伍拍片，但軍旅生活遠比想像難以適應。隨著戰事膠著，血腥、殘酷與孤寂逐步侵蝕他作為記錄者的感性。當死亡摧殘親人戰友，徒留仇恨蔓延，生命卑微如草芥，人性是否已太過稀薄而無處容身？一旦成為毫不猶豫開槍的機器，還能找回愛與家庭這些曾經熟悉的事物嗎？ Filmed over three and a half years on Ukraine’s frontline, the film follows a young filmmaker who trades his camera for a rifle and joins the Territorial Defence Forces. As war reshapes his life, he moves from storyteller to soldier, documenting fear, loss and resilience amid chaos. 2025 Sheffield Doc/Fest 英國雪菲爾德紀錄片影展 2025 Toronto IFF 多倫多國際影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
screen_name: 台北獅子林新光影城 三廳
synopsis_en:
At the outbreak of the Russo-Ukrainian War, the director volunteered to enlist to document the battlefield firsthand, but military life proved far more difficult to adapt to than he had imagined. As the conflict ground into a stalemate, the bloodshed, cruelty, and isolation began to erode his sensibilities as a chronicler. When death claims loved ones and comrades, leaving only the spread of hatred and rendering life as cheap as weeds, is humanity spread too thin to find a place to dwell? Once one becomes a machine that pulls the trigger without hesitation, is it possible to reclaim the once-familiar comforts of love and family?

Filmed over three and a half years on Ukraine’s frontline, the film follows a young filmmaker who trades his camera for a rifle and joins the Territorial Defence Forces. As war reshapes his life, he moves from storyteller to soldier, documenting fear, loss, and resilience amid chaos.

2025 Sheffield Doc/Fest
2025 Toronto IFF
